summary: Completed frontend testing of School CRM enhancements and Inquiry page updates. All P0 features working correctly. One minor P1 issue found with offerings filter logic.

integration_issues.issue: Offerings section doesn't appear when programs are selected because filter logic checks o.name but API returns o.title, and categories (lab, curriculum, program) don't match program names (Robotics, Coding)

passed_tests: P0: School CRM Dashboard tab - Shows 4 quick stats (Meetings This Week, Followups Due, Active Schools, New Leads)
P0: School CRM Dashboard tab - Shows 'This Week's Meetings' section with meeting cards
P0: School CRM Dashboard tab - Shows 'Followup Schedule' section
P0: School CRM has 3 tabs: Dashboard, Leads & Schools, Contact Management
P0: School CRM Leads & Schools tab - Shows status filters (New Leads 8, Meeting Done 1, Converted 1, Active Schools 2, Renewed 0, Lost 0, Archived 19)
P0: School CRM Leads & Schools tab - Shows school cards with contact info, location, board, programs
P0: School CRM Contact Management tab - Shows contacts table with columns: Contact, School, Role, Birthday, Actions
P0: School CRM Contact Management tab - Shows all contacts extracted from schools with edit action
P0: Add Meeting button (+ icon) appears on school cards for meeting_done, converted, active, renewed statuses
P0: Add Meeting modal opens with title 'Add Followup Meeting - [School Name]'
P0: Add Meeting modal has Meeting Type (Offline/Online), Date picker, Time slots, Notes field
P1: Inquiry page (/add) - Student type has multi-select skills (Robotics, Coding, AI, Entrepreneurship, Financial Literacy)
P1: Inquiry page (/add) - School type has multi-select programs (Robotics, Coding, AI & ML, Entrepreneurship, Financial Literacy)
P1: Inquiry page (/add) - School type has 'Send personalized email with offerings details' checkbox
P1: Inquiry page (/add) - Autocomplete shows existing records when typing 3+ chars in name/phone/email
action_items: MINOR: Fix offerings filter in InquiryPage.jsx - change o.name to o.title and update category matching logic to properly filter offerings based on selected programs
critical_code_review_comments: InquiryPage.jsx line 953-956: Offerings filter uses o.name but API returns o.title. Also category values (lab, curriculum, program) don't match program names (Robotics, Coding). Consider updating filter to: o.title?.toLowerCase().includes(p.toLowerCase()) || o.category?.toLowerCase().includes(p.toLowerCase())
context_for_next_testing_agent: School CRM enhancements fully tested. Dashboard tab shows this week's meetings and followups. Leads & Schools tab has status filters and school cards. Contact Management tab shows all contacts in a table. Add Meeting button works on active/converted/meeting_done/renewed status cards. Inquiry page has multi-select skills for students and programs for schools. Minor issue: offerings section doesn't appear for schools due to filter logic mismatch.

School_CRM_Dashboard_Tab.details: Shows 4 quick stats, This Week's Meetings section, Followup Schedule section

School_CRM_Leads_Schools_Tab.details: Shows 7 status filters with counts, school cards with full details and action buttons

School_CRM_Contact_Management_Tab.details: Shows contacts table with Contact, School, Role, Birthday, Actions columns

Add_Meeting_Button.details: + button appears on meeting_done/converted/active/renewed cards, opens modal with date/time/notes

Inquiry_Student_MultiSelect_Skills.details: Skills Interested (Select multiple) with 5 skill options, multiple can be selected

Inquiry_School_MultiSelect_Programs.details: Programs Interested with 5 program options, multiple can be selected

Inquiry_School_Email_Checkbox.details: Send personalized email with offerings details checkbox present and clickable

Inquiry_School_Offerings_Section.details: Offerings section doesn't appear due to filter logic issue - o.name vs o.title mismatch

screenshots: .screenshots/school_crm_dashboard.png - Dashboard tab with stats and meetings
.screenshots/school_crm_leads_tab.png - Leads & Schools tab with status filters
.screenshots/inquiry_school_final.png - School inquiry with email checkbox checked
